text:
Title: What is Google Gemini? | IBM
URL: https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQG2WzW8AU5l0u9JlB7CDQApMrE3IoEHsbAXMd8THJF-ivikGyhnIGQ4iAHYegLBxiUTprY5TPhrl_UrmdtXZOsMkMRPH3wjY0nh3cYe_4uD2j8kYPEVSrjl-DtIwlOYDA3Dbm0yc7YIwF8=
Gemini is Google's large language model (LLM) and a family of multimodal AI models designed to process various data types including audio, images, code, text, and video. It powers Google's generative AI chatbot, formerly known as Bard, and is being integrated into Google's suite of technologies like Pixel phones and Google Workspace.
